pi_items.source: Task description and setup/export scripts confirm this is the required output file path for the configuration document

Microsoft Learn documentation and environment setup scripts (setup_edge.sh line 16-21) confirm this is the correct path for Microsoft Edge on Linux. Local State is the JSON file where browser experiments/flags are stored.

Verified via Chromium documentation. Flag 'smooth-scrolling' exists in Edge/Chrome (chrome://flags/#smooth-scrolling). Value '2' indicates Disabled state, which matches task description requirement 'Smooth Scrolling: DISABLED'.

Verified via Chromium documentation. Flag 'enable-parallel-downloading' exists in Edge/Chrome (edge://flags/#enable-parallel-downloading). Value '1' indicates Enabled state, matching task requirement 'Parallel downloading: ENABLED'.

Verified via Chromium documentation. Flag 'enable-force-dark' is the experimental flag for Force Dark Mode (edge://flags/#enable-force-dark), which implements 'Auto Dark Mode for Web Contents'. Value '1' indicates Enabled state, matching task requirement 'Auto Dark Mode for Web Contents: ENABLED'.

Verified via Chromium documentation. Flag 'enable-quic' exists in Edge/Chrome (edge://flags/#enable-quic) for QUIC protocol support. Value '1' indicates Enabled state, matching task requirement 'Experimental QUIC protocol: ENABLED'.

Verified via Chromium documentation. Flag 'tab-hover-card-images' exists in Edge/Chrome (edge://flags/#tab-hover-card-images) for tab preview images in hover cards. Value '2' indicates Disabled state, matching task requirement 'Tab Hover Card Images: DISABLED'.
Verified via Chromium source code conventions. Suffix @1 in enabled_labs_experiments JSON represents Enabled state.
Verified via Chromium source code conventions. Suffix @2 in enabled_labs_experiments JSON represents Disabled state.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring five Microsoft Edge experimental flags stored in ~/.config/microsoft-edge/Local State. All flag names verified as real Chromium-based flags: smooth-scrolling (must be value 2/Disabled), enable-parallel-downloading (value 1/Enabled), enable-force-dark (value 1/Enabled), enable-quic (value 1/Enabled), and tab-hover-card-images (value 2/Disabled). The configuration file output path is /home/ga/Desktop/edge_flags_config.txt. All metadata values match verified Chromium/Edge flag conventions and documentation.
